rows.label: qev061002_MSG0017
rows.name:
Ah... urgh... ...I can't...
put any strength into it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0019
rows.name:
There's a very strong wave of Voltant
nearby... What in the world... is this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0020
rows.name:
Ohh... My entire body is filling with
Voltant!! This is a genuine Zirtodiamond!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0120
rows.name: Uwah! Aaaaaaaaaaaah!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0021
rows.name: Uuugh... Aah... ...Phew.........[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Huh... You're the hallucination I saw
earlier... Hey... Could it be that you
were the one who brought this to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0030
rows.name: Demand[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell him to hand over the relic of Golbogga.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0041
rows.name: Express concern over whether his body is okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0023
rows.name:
So you were not an illusion after
all... ...Well then, I made a
promise, so it cannot be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0024
rows.name:
This disk is the relic of Golbogga. Please
take it. You have the right to do so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0025
rows.name:
Thanks to you, Voltant has
spread to every corner of my
body. This is all thanks to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0026
rows.name:
Hm... Now then, allow me to fulfill
the promise I made at that time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0027
rows.name:
This disk is the relic of
Golbogga. Please take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0028
rows.name:
...But it is a strange tale. Why would
an Earthling want something like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0029
rows.name:
...What!? You were asked to
come here by that Feloran!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0030
rows.name:
Kuh... If I had known that, I wouldn't
have handed it over so easily...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0031
rows.name:
It is not too late! If you hand it
over to a Golbogga fanatic like him,
he will only spread dubious rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0032
rows.name:
Return it to me immediately! If
you do, I will prove to you that
Golbogga does not exist![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0050
rows.name: Refuse[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0051
rows.name: Firmly refuse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0060
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask the reason why he hates Feloran.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0033
rows.name:
So you are also a fool who blindly believes
in the existence of a Golbogga you have never
seen, just like the other Zaruboggans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Then take it! However, all that
is inside is proof that Golbogga
never existed in the first place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0035
rows.name:
Because he is a liar who insists
that something as non-existent
as Golbogga actually exists![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0036
rows.name:
...I proposed the theory that Zaruboggans are
the result of microorganisms drifting in Voltant
evolving into our current form, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0037
rows.name:
The thesis I submitted was buried
in darkness by those who believe
in the existence of Golbogga...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0038
rows.name:
In order to exact my revenge on them, I
stole this Golbogga Disk from the grand
cathedral back when we were on Planet Bedun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0039
rows.name:
...That's it! Could you help
me unlock this Golbogga Disk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0040
rows.name:
Let us expose that
Feloran's lies together![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0070
rows.name: Refuse[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0071
rows.name: Firmly refuse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0080
rows.name: Accept[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0081
rows.name: Take Toluera up on his offer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0041
rows.name:
So you are also a fool who blindly believes
in the existence of a Golbogga you have never
seen, just like the other Zaruboggans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Then take it! But all that is
inside is proof that Golbogga never
existed in the first place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0043
rows.name:
I am very glad... The Zaruboggans have always
treated me as an enemy, you see... You are
the very first ally I have ever made.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0044
rows.name:
...Now then, please find a Zaruboggan
named Kiliran by any means necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0045
rows.name:
If it is him, he should be able to undo
the strict lock placed on this disk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hehe... Once that is done, it
will become perfectly clear
that Golbogga never existed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0050
rows.name:
Oh, comrade! How did it go? Were you
able to unlock the Golbogga Disk?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0051
rows.name:
Splendid! It seems it can
be fully viewed now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0052
rows.name:
Hehe... Now then, shall we tear
off their mask of deception![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0053
rows.name:
The Golboggas who have deceived us
Zaruboggans for thousands of years...
No, those swindler religious scholars![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0054
rows.name:
I, Toluera, the foremost biologist
among the Zaruboggans, shall
uncover the truth right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0055
rows.name: Fuhahahaha!! Haha! Ha... ha...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0057
rows.name:
...What is this... This is absurd! ...I
absolutely refuse to accept this!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0058
rows.name:
My research showed that Zaruboggans
evolved from microorganisms drifting
in Voltant... Aaah...!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0059
rows.name:
A-And why does Golbogga
look like this...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0090
rows.name: Interest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask him in detail what he refuses to accept.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0100
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0101
rows.name: Ask about Golbogga's appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0060
rows.name:
If this fraudulent disk is true... Ugh...
It would mean Golbogga actually existed
during the previous civilization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0061
rows.name:
It says that before they completely covered
Planet Bedun with Voltant, they created us to
be the organisms that would live in the next era.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0062
rows.name:
Gugh... Then does that mean all
the research I have done up
until now was pointless...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0063
rows.name:
That cannot be! That
simply cannot be true!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0064
rows.name:
Furthermore... The form of these Golboggas
looks exactly like you Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0065
rows.name:
Golbogga does not exist...
They must not exist! The form
shown here is also a fake![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0066
rows.name:
If it isn't, all of my research would be
pointless... And it would mean Feloran's
delusions were correct, would it not...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0067
rows.name:
That cannot be! That
simply cannot be true!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0068
rows.name:
Moreover, why does Golbogga's
form... Why does it look
exactly like you Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0069
rows.name:
Aah! You are... the enemy! You
are mocking me by taking on
the same form as Golbogga![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0070
rows.name:
I'll give you this, so go away
somewhere! Aah... I am not
wrong... I am not wrong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0071
rows.name:
...Are you Earthlings also planning to drench
this planet in Voltant just like the Golboggas,
and give birth to twisted lives like ours?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0072
rows.name:
Aah... Who do you think you are! Trampling on
and denying the evolution of organisms, do
you think you have become gods yourselves![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0110
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0111
rows.name: Declare that you have the right to do so.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0120
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0121
rows.name: Say that Earthlings are not such arrogant beings.

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0073
rows.name:
What an arrogant wretch! Kuh... To
think someone like you will also leak
Voltant all over this planet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0074
rows.name:
And give birth to a second generation
of us... To empty lives that deviate
from the cycle of biological organisms![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0075
rows.name:
Everyone just tries to deceive me like
that! I am sure this disk is also a lie!
There is no such thing... as a creator...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0076
rows.name:
Uugh... May all the Voltant
disappear from this world, and
may the Zaruboggans perish!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0077
rows.name: Uwaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah! I... I...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0001
rows.name:
A... Aah... So I have finally
started seeing hallucinations...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0002
rows.name:
But why is the hallucination
appearing at a time like this an
Earthling? How very strange...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0010
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain that you are not a hallucination.

rows.label: qev061002_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev061002_SEL0021
rows.name: Confirm the situation Toluera is currently in.

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0003
rows.name:
The hallucination is explaining its own
existence... And it is quite logical at
that. This is... rather interesting...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0004
rows.name:
The hallucination has asked me a
question... Haha... This is quite amusing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0005
rows.name:
I have not undergone Revoltant
for a very long time now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0006
rows.name:
As for the Voltant that was in
this hideout... I have already
used it all up for Revoltant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0007
rows.name:
Good grief... I have answered you, so act like a
proper hallucination and disappear. I am... already
finding it troublesome to even keep my eyes open...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Eh? You are saying you
are not a hallucination?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0009
rows.name:
Haha! I don't believe you. Unlike my
brethren who blindly believe in the
existence of unproven beings, I am different.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0010
rows.name:
Well, if you have no intention of disappearing
just yet, I shall keep you company to the bitter
end. For what purpose have you appeared?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0011
rows.name:
...What? You want me to hand over
the relic of Golbogga? This is quite
the impudent hallucination...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0012
rows.name:
However... If you bring me a Zirtodiamond
that possesses a massive amount of Voltant,
I wouldn't mind letting you take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0013
rows.name:
I went through the trouble of stealing it from
the cathedral in order to prove Golbogga's
non-existence, but... I don't care anymore...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0014
rows.name:
If I cannot undergo Revoltant like
this, I will simply fade away without
fulfilling such a dream anyway...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0015
rows.name:
Aah... My body is parched
dry... It feels as though I
will disappear at any moment...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0016
rows.name:
I do not care if you are a hallucination
or what... Please just let me undergo
Revoltant with a Zirtodiamond quickly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0047
rows.name:
...I will continue my research
here, even if I am alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0048
rows.name:
Hmph... Golbogga does not exist.
Someday, I will open the eyes
of all the Zaruboggans...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0049
rows.name:
Please find Kiliran no matter what it takes.
I am not certain where exactly he is, but
he is definitely somewhere on this Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev061002_MSG0078
rows.name:
Hehe... Let us prove the
non-existence of Golbogga together![ST:wait ]
